languages.original_text: "The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."

languages.text: "Вектор вашего любопытства вызывает обеспокоенность, генетор Фебрус. Еще несколько таких вопросов, и я в ответ начну интересоваться сутью ваших изысканий".
"The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."
languages.original_text: "Вектор вашего любопытства вызывает обеспокоенность, генетор Фебрус. Еще несколько таких вопросов, и я в ответ начну интересоваться сутью ваших изысканий".

traits.locale_text: "The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."
"The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."
"The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."

languages.text: «La ruta que sigue su curiosidad es preocupante, genetor Februs. Si continúa con esa clase de preguntas, me veré obligado a interesarme por la naturaleza de su investigación».
languages.original_text: "The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."

traits.locale_text: «La ruta que sigue su curiosidad es preocupante, genetor Februs. Si continúa con esa clase de preguntas, me veré obligado a interesarme por la naturaleza de su investigación».

languages.text: 「あなたの好奇心の向かう先は、憂慮すべきものだな、ゲネター・フェブラス。あと数問もそのような問いを重ねれば、私はあなたの研究の本質に関心を抱かざるを得なくなる」
languages.original_text: "The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの好奇心の向かう先は、憂慮すべきものだな、ゲネター・フェブラス。あと数問もそのような問いを重ねれば、私はあなたの研究の本質に関心を抱かざるを得なくなる」

languages.text: “你那好奇心的走向令人不安，基因士费布鲁斯。再问几个这样的问题，恐怕我就不得不对你的研究性质产生兴趣了。”
languages.original_text: "The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."

traits.locale_text: “你那好奇心的走向令人不安，基因士费布鲁斯。再问几个这样的问题，恐怕我就不得不对你的研究性质产生兴趣了。”

languages.text: "Die Trajektion Eurer Neugier ist beunruhigend, Genetor Februs. Noch mehr solche Fragen und ich fange an, mich für die Natur Eurer Forschung zu interessieren."
languages.original_text: "The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."

traits.locale_text: "Die Trajektion Eurer Neugier ist beunruhigend, Genetor Februs. Noch mehr solche Fragen und ich fange an, mich für die Natur Eurer Forschung zu interessieren."

languages.text: « Votre curiosité est troublante, genetor Februs. Encore quelques questions de ce genre, et je pourrais bien commencer à m'intéresser à vos recherches. »
languages.original_text: "The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."

traits.locale_text: « Votre curiosité est troublante, genetor Februs. Encore quelques questions de ce genre, et je pourrais bien commencer à m'intéresser à vos recherches. »

languages.text: "Merakınızın yönü endişe verici Genetör Februs. Bu tür birkaç soru daha sorarsanız araştırmanızın doğasıyla ilgilenmek zorunda kalacağım."
languages.original_text: "The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."

traits.locale_text: "Merakınızın yönü endişe verici Genetör Februs. Bu tür birkaç soru daha sorarsanız araştırmanızın doğasıyla ilgilenmek zorunda kalacağım."
